name: Saliva Quail
steps: Finely chop garlic, and fry in the sesame oil no colour but cooked.
Add all the other ingredients and mix well.
Roast the quail in the Josper in a tray on 300-320C breast side up for 2min.
Turn the tray and roast for another 2 min on the other side.
Rest the quail for 5min breast side up and turn it breast side down for another 5min.
Get it back into the Josper and repeat the procedure in the first step.
Once it's rested cut the breasts and legs off and store in the fridge.
Get 2 tablespoon worth of saliva base on the red floral (or green oval plate) and place over the Quail breasts and legs.
Create a circle of oil around the rim with Sichuan chilli oil and top it with cracked hazelnuts.
